title: đź›ˇď¸Ź Sentinel: [CRITICAL] Fix insecure deserialization in Hugging Face models
body:
đźš¨ **Severity:** CRITICAL
đź’ˇ **Vulnerability:** Hugging Face models and tokenizers in `nlp_analyzer.py` were loaded without enforcing the `safetensors` format, making them susceptible to arbitrary code execution via malicious Pickle files.
đźŽŻ **Impact:** If malicious weights are provided or a supply-chain attack occurs, loading unsafe models could result in Remote Code Execution (RCE) on the host running the pipeline.
đź”§ **Fix:** Added `use_safetensors=True` to the `AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained` and `AutoModelForSequenceClassification.from_pretrained` calls.
âś… **Verification:** Verified by running `pytest tests/test_nlp_analyzer.py` which passes correctly without regressions.
